nasb.text: Just as we have borne the image of the earthy, we will also bear the image of the heavenly.

esv.text: Just as we have borne the image of the man of dust, we shall also bear the image of the man of heaven.

cnv.text: 我們既然有了屬土的形象，將來也必有屬天的形象。

ccb.text: 我们既然有属地的形象，将来也必有属天的形象。

csbs.text: 就像我们带有了属尘土的那个人的形像， 我们也将带有属天的那一位的形像。
